heading: Continued use of amounts for affordable housing
label: 4140 Continued use of amounts for affordable housing
text: Any funds for programs for low-income housing under the United States Housing Act of 1937 [ et seq.] that, on the date of the applicability of this chapter to an Indian tribe, are owned by, or in the possession or under the control of, the Indian housing authority for the tribe, including all reserves not otherwise obligated, shall be considered assistance under this chapter and subject to the provisions of this chapter relating to use of such assistance.42 U.S.C. 1437
notes: References in TextThe United States Housing Act of 1937, referred to in text, is , as revised generally by , , , which is classified generally to chapter 8 (§ 1437 et seq.) of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare.
